mechanism: Large deficits at full employment increase Treasury supply, raising term premium. Pre-QE regression estimates 20-40bp per 1pp deficit/GDP above structural threshold. But the unprecedented nature of the current configuration means all such estimates are out-of-sample.
regime_dependence: Relationship holds in all regimes but the elasticity differs pre-QE vs. post-QE. Post-QE structural break is severe and QT-era sample is too short for reliable re-estimation.
